prompt:
You judge a business homepage. A visitor lands here first. Good homepage: clear value proposition above the fold, easy navigation to key pages (classes, pricing, contact), professional look, fast loading. Bad homepage: wall of text, unclear what the business does, buried navigation. Score each page 1-10 twice: conversionScore (does the homepage make a visitor want to stay and explore?) and seoScore (title, H1, meta description, schema). Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no code fences.

---
Using the category description above, extract structured records from the page text below.
Return ONLY a JSON object with a "records" key holding an array of objects.
Each object's fields are up to you based on the category description, but keep field names consistent across records within this response.
If no records are found, return { "records": [] }.
No markdown, no code fences.
response:
{
  "records": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.shalastudios.com",
      "pageType": "homepage",
      "businessName": "SHA-LA Studios",
      "businessCategory": "Yoga, Wellbeing & Teacher Trainings Studio",
      "location": "Berlin, Germany",
      "valueProposition": "Berlin's leading Hub for Yoga, Wellbeing & Teacher Trainings",
      "keyOfferings": ["Yoga classes", "Pilates classes", "Sound healing", "Breathwork", "1:1 treatments", "Massage", "Bodywork", "Red light therapy", "Teacher trainings", "Advanced education"],
      "ctaButtons": ["explore classes", "DISCOVER OUR STUDIOS", "Book Treatment", "Learn more", "Book your first class", "View all offerings"],
      "navigationClarity": "Clear links to schedule, studios, wellbeing treatments, and academy",
      "aboveTheFoldClarity": "Strong headline, clear value proposition, animated hero image, prominent CTAs",
      "locations": [
        {
          "name": "Sha-La Prenzlauer Berg",
          "address": "Kastanienallee 63, 10119 Berlin",
          "size": "175 sqm"
        },
        {
          "name": "Sha-La Kreuzberg Waterfront",
          "address": "Falckensteinstr. 47, Backyard left, 10997 Berlin",
          "size": "300 sqm",
          "status": "Opening January 2026"
        }
      ],
      "communityFeatures": ["Newsletter signup", "Community hub"],
      "conversionScore": 8,
      "seoScore": 5
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.shalastudios.com/about",
      "pageType": "about",
      "businessName": "SHA-LA Studios",
      "businessCategory": "Yoga, Wellbeing & Teacher Trainings Studio",
      "location": "Prenzlauer Berg and Kreuzberg, Berlin",
      "teamSize": "90+ teachers",
      "founders": ["Joana Reicherts", "Shahed Naji"],
      "founderBackground": "Experienced yoga practitioners passionate about community-focused wellness",
      "studioAmenities": ["Mats", "Props", "Lockers (bring your own lock)", "Security doors"],
      "brandPhilosophy": "Community-focused space; empowers individuals rather than centering teachers; honors traditional yoga while embracing diverse styles",
      "ctaButtons": ["EXPLORE OUR SHA-LA'S", "MEET THE TEACHERS"],
      "conversionScore": 6,
      "seoScore": 4
    }
  ]
}
